name: Herbed Beef and Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds well-trimmed boneless beef chuck, cut into 1-inch chunks
1 can (35 oz.) imported Italian plum tomatoes
1/2 cup dry white wine or beef broth
12 ounces fresh green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and salt. Coat meat, shaking off excess.
2. Heat oil in a 4- to 5-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat until it looks thin and rippling but not smoking. Brown beef in 2 or 3 batches.
3. Return all meat to pot. Stir in tomatoes, broth, wine, garlic, herbs, pepper, and bay leaves. Bring to a boil, reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring 3 or 4 times.
4. Add carrots, mushrooms, green beans, celery, and parsley. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes longer, stirring once or twice, until meat and vegetables are tender. Garnish with herbs.
Makes 12 cups. 8 servings. Per serving made with wine: 424 calories, 51 g protein, 14 g carbohydrates, 17 g fat, 136 mg cholesterol, 968 mg sodium.
